rows.label: qev075502_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Oh! [ST:playername]! What are you doing
in a place like this? Did you
perhaps come to fight me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev075502_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell him about Go Rogan's request.

rows.label: qev075502_JNK0020
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075502_SEL0021
rows.name: Nod and take a combat stance.

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0002
rows.name:
...There's a villain attacking
soldiers at random around here!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0003
rows.name:
I've been training here the
whole time, but I haven't seen
anyone like that, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Hm? Who was I training with? Well, I've
been challenging strong-looking people
passing by one after another to matches...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Huh? Could it be that
the villain is... me!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075502_SEL0031
rows.name: Urge Gi Zang to reflect on his actions.

rows.label: qev075502_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev075502_SEL0041
rows.name: Argue passionately that there must be another culprit.

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0006
rows.name:
I got too absorbed in my training and
ended up doing something terrible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Thanks for telling me. Well...
I'll go apologize to everyone
later. But before that...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0008
rows.name:
If a guy like that was running wild around
here, I would have already beaten him up.
This is... I've done something terrible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'll have to go apologize properly
later... ...But you know, before that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0010
rows.name:
[ST:playername]! Let's have a match! I finally...
acquired techniques enough to defeat you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0011
rows.name: Quick to understand as always![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hehe! I've been randomly
challenging strong-looking
people passing by here to matches.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0013
rows.name:
I've... mastered an incredible
ultimate move. I definitely won't
lose this time, you hear?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Alright! If that's decided, let's head
to the second terrane of Talon Rock! It's
way too narrow for us to fight here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0015
rows.name: ...I lost, huh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0016
rows.name:
This is a technique passed down through
the Hundred Hellions since ancient times.
It was Grandpa's signature move.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0017
rows.name:
I always admired it... and I was finally
able to use it here on Mira, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0018
rows.name:
Haaah! Just how strong are you! Even I'm
getting fed up with this. No matter how
much I train, the gap won't close![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_JNK0050
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev075502_SEL0051
rows.name: Tell him it was a very close match.

rows.label: qev075502_JNK0060
rows.name: Provoke

rows.label: qev075502_SEL0061
rows.name: Sneer and ask if he's already giving up.

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0019
rows.name:
...That tiny gap just won't
close! Honestly, [ST:playername], you're...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0020
rows.name:
The greatest rival! When I fight a
ridiculous person like you, I even
forget my grudge against the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0021
rows.name:
Damn it, I'm so frustrated! I
absolutely won't lose next time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0022
rows.name:
...You're a cruel one.
Honestly, [ST:playername], you're...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0023
rows.name:
The greatest rival! With a strong
and pleasant person like you
standing right in front of me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0024
rows.name:
No matter how I lose, how
could I ever give up! I
absolutely won't lose next time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Alright! Well, now that I've been
soundly defeated, I'll go apologize to
the people I troubled during my training.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0026
rows.name:
Man, I did go pretty hard on them... I
wonder if everyone will forgive me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0027
rows.name:
I heard this person was saved by Grandpa
and the others on the battlefield.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0028
rows.name:
So he said he owed the Hundred
Hellions a debt of gratitude... And
forgave me for everything I did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0029
rows.name:
...How should I say this, to
still be relying on Grandpa's
care even in a place like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075502_MSG0030
rows.name:
I really... need to get my act
together as the surviving member
of the Hundred Hellions.[ST:wait ]
